name: Frozen Head & Trotter Soup
shortDesc: Carefully trimmed beef head meat and marrow bone broth slow-simmered for hours, then flash-frozen — traditional flavour preserved
metaDesc: Çorbacı frozen head and trotter soup. Carefully trimmed head meat and long-simmered bone broth, flash-frozen.
keywords: frozen head and trotter soup, kelle paca, flash-frozen head soup, corbaci frozen
longDesc: Beef head is carefully cleaned and trimmed, then simmered for hours with marrow bone broth
Onion, garlic, bay leaf and black pepper deliver the traditional aroma and depth
Flash-freezing preserves both flavour and nutritional value just as on the day it was made — no additives or preservatives
Simply heat from frozen — traditional head and trotter soup on your table in minutes with garlic and vinegar

otherDesc.name: Storage
otherDesc.value: Can be kept in the freezer for 6 months

otherDesc.name: Shelf Life
otherDesc.value: Once thawed, consume at first heating
